0 AND-NOT 37

Preferred from left
0 AND-NOT 37
1 I 4
2 I 5
3 I 6

6 I 1
7 I 2

Matched
0 AND-NOT 37
1 I 4
2 I 5
3 I 6
4 I 7
5 I 0
6 I 1
7 I 2

Applying to 11110100
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 AND-NOT 37 = AND(I 3,I 7n) = AND(I 3,NOT(I 7)) = AND(1,NOT(0)) = AND(1,1) = 1
1 I 4 = 0
2 I 5 = 1
3 I 6 = 0
4 I 7 = 0
5 I 0 = 1
6 I 1 = 1
7 I 2 = 1

\boxed{10100111}
